metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — WV
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for West Virginia metro area counties.
sources: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey

notes.tax_rate_format: Effective rate as decimal fraction of market value (e.g. 0.0065 = 0.65%).
notes.scope: Martinsburg, Huntington, Charleston metro — Berkeley, Cabell, Kanawha counties.
notes.update_cycle: Assessed values set by county assessors. Levies set annually by counties, municipalities, school districts.
notes.assessment_method: WV Class II owner-occupied residential assessed at 60% of appraised (market) value. Levy rates per $100 of assessed value. The _computed effective_rate is expressed on market value (median taxes paid / median home value), netting out the 60% assessment ratio.
notes.veteran_credit: Disabled Veteran Real Property Tax Credit (WV Code §11-13MM-4) — refundable income tax credit equal to 100% of property taxes timely paid on homestead for veterans rated 90%+ P&T. Also general Homestead Exemption ($20,000 assessed value for 65+/permanently disabled, §11-6B).

metadata._comment: West Virginia county property tax data. WV assesses Class II residential at 60% of market value, but _computed fields are expressed on market value for consumer consistency.

veteran_exemption_state_law.statute: WV Code §11-13MM-4 (Disabled Veteran Real Property Tax Credit), §11-6B (Homestead Exemption)
veteran_exemption_state_law.description: Refundable income tax credit equal to 100% of ad valorem property taxes timely paid on homestead for veterans with 90%+ combined VA disability rating (permanent and total). Filed on WV income tax return (form DV-1). Replaces the previous $20,000 assessed-value exemption for 100% P&T veterans. Separate general Homestead Exemption ($20,000 assessed value) available for 65+ or permanently/totally disabled homeowners.
veteran_exemption_state_law.surviving_spouse_conditions: Eligible widowed spouse of a veteran who claimed the credit in a prior year

application.deadline: Applications for exemption filed July 1 through December 1

property_tax.assessment_method: 60% of appraised market value (Class II residential)
property_tax.payment_schedule: Semi-annual: September 1 and March 1 (2.5% discount for early payment)
property_tax.homestead_exemption_note: $20,000 of assessed value for 65+ or permanently/totally disabled owner-occupants

disabled_veteran_real_property_tax_credi.eligibility: 90%+ combined VA disability rating, permanent and total
disabled_veteran_real_property_tax_credi.benefit: Refundable income tax credit equal to 100% of property taxes timely paid on homestead
disabled_veteran_real_property_tax_credi.application: File WV income tax return with form DV-1; attach VA award letter

homestead_exemption.eligibility: 65+ or permanently/totally disabled (any cause, including VA disability)
homestead_exemption.application: File with county assessor; one-time application (auto-renews)
